title: JAML - Jimbo's Ante Markup Language
description: Schema for Balatro seed filter configuration files (.jaml)

id.description: Canonical normalized identifier for this filter. Used as the stable filter ID when provided.

description.description: Description of what this filter searches for

dateCreated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when filter was created

seeds.description: Known seed examples associated with this filter.

hashtags.description: Optional discovery tags for this filter.

aesthetics.description: Optional seed-space constraints from JamlAesthetic (see definitions/JamlAesthetic). Applied when compatible; conflicts with host seeds, keywords, or random mode.

defaults.description: Default values applied to clauses when a clause does not specify its own values.

antes.description: Default antes to check if a clause does not specify antes.

boosterPacks.description: Default pack offering slots to inspect.

shopItems.description: Default shop item slots to inspect.

must.description: Required clauses. All listed clauses must match.

should.description: Scored clauses. Matching clauses add score but do not gate the seed by themselves.

mustNot.description: Rejected clauses. If any listed clause matches, the seed is rejected.

type.description: Explicit clause type when using the type/value form.

value.description: Primary clause value when using the explicit type/value form.

eventType.description: Event clause value for the explicit type/eventType form.

jokers.description: Joker clause matching any listed joker names.

commonJokers.description: Common Joker clause matching any listed common joker names.

uncommonJokers.description: Uncommon Joker clause matching any listed uncommon joker names.

rareJokers.description: Rare Joker clause matching any listed rare joker names.

mixedJokers.description: Mixed-rarity Joker clause matching any listed joker names.

vouchers.description: Voucher clause matching any listed voucher names.

tag.description: Tag clause matching either blind position.

score.description: Score contribution for should clauses (can be negative to penalize).

min.description: Minimum matches required for this clause.

max.description: Maximum matches allowed for this clause.

luckyMoney.description: LuckyMoney event: roll indices (direct key; same as event: LuckyMoney + rolls).

wheelOfFortune.description: Wheel of Fortune event: roll indices.

grosMichelExtinct.description: Gros Michel extinct event: roll indices.

soulEditionRolls.description: Extra soul-stream edition reads per ante for the legendary edition vector prefilter (0 = use booster pack list length).

soulCardOnly.description: Legendary / soul joker: match when The Soul tarot/spectral card appears in a pack, without rolling the legendary joker.

multValue.description: Exact mult value for MisprintMult event (0-23). If omitted, matches any value.

shopItems.description: Clause-level source mapping for shop item slots.

boosterPacks.description: Clause-level source mapping for pack offering slots.

minShopSlot.description: Minimum shop slot index for range generation.

maxShopSlot.description: Maximum shop slot index for range generation.

minPackSlot.description: Minimum pack slot index for range generation.

maxPackSlot.description: Maximum pack slot index for range generation.

sources.description: Source mapping that describes where the clause may be satisfied.

shopItems.description: Full shop item stream (every slot, any item type). Slower than raw *ShopJokers streams; indices are assembled shop slots.

boosterPacks.description: Pack offering slot indices. Legendary soul: if arcanaBoosterPacks/spectralBoosterPacks are set, this combined list is ignored for matching.

arcanaBoosterPacks.description: Legendary soul joker: slots only for The Soul via arcana/tarot packs (not spectral).

spectralBoosterPacks.description: Legendary soul joker: slots only for The Soul via spectral packs.

minShopSlot.description: Minimum shop slot index for range generation.

maxShopSlot.description: Maximum shop slot index for range generation.

minPackSlot.description: Minimum pack slot index for range generation.

maxPackSlot.description: Maximum pack slot index for range generation.

requireMega.description: Legendary soul joker: only Mega-sized booster packs (e.g. Charm Tag Mega arcana). Other clauses: Mega where applicable.

purpleSealOrEightBall.description: Purple Seal or 8 Ball tarot roll indices.

uncommonShopJokers.description: Uncommon joker PRNG stream only (no vouchers/consumables) — fast SIMD. Indices are 0..n uncommon joker rolls, not necessarily the same numbering as shopItems slots when the shop mixes item types.

rareShopJokers.description: Rare joker PRNG stream only — fast SIMD; indices are rare joker rolls.

commonShopJokers.description: Common joker PRNG stream only — fast SIMD; indices are common joker rolls.

allShopJokers.description: All-rarity shop joker stream — fast SIMD; indices are combined joker-offer positions.

JamlAesthetic.title: JamlAesthetic
JamlAesthetic.description: Named constraint on which seeds participate in search. Motely: see JamlAesthetics for enumeration and Matches(); seed alphabet is MotelyGlobals.SeedDigits, max length MotelyGlobals.MaxSeedLength.
